job_summary: A Medical Device CRA monitors clinical trials involving medical devices such as implants, diagnostic tools, and surgical equipment.
key_responsibilities: Monitor device clinical trials and ensure proper device usage
Train site staff on device handling and protocols
qualifications: Degree in Biomedical Engineering / Life Sciences / Pharmacy
skills: Knowledge of medical devices and regulations
career_path: Medical Device CRA → Device Trial Manager → Regulatory Specialist
skills_required: knowledge of medical devices and regulations
monitor device clinical trials and ensure proper device usage
train site staff on device handling and protocols
